headline: GoDaddy (GDDY) Is Up 7.8% After Discounted .coms Hit 2026 Outlook And Spur Legal Probe – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: GoDaddy Inc. reported its fourth-quarter 2025 results in February 2026, with revenue rising to US$1,273.9 million and net income to US$245.1 million, while full-year 2025 revenue grew to US$4.95 billion even as annual net income and earnings per share eased versus 2024. Alongside these results, GoDaddy completed a sizeable share repurchase program, disclosed that promotional .com pricing would weigh on 2026 bookings and near-term revenue, and now faces a shareholder-focused legal...
